block.ltxi.rocket_turret: §o“御风”§r A/DS 防空火箭炮塔
death.attack.ltxi.arc_turret.unowned: %s被野生的解离炮塔电击身亡
hint.ltxi.invalid_blueprint: 此蓝图中的配方无效或已损坏。Shift+右键单击清除。
hint.ltxi.invalid_upgrade: 此模块中的升级无效或已损坏。Shift+右键单击清除。
hint.ltxi.io_card.empty: 未存储IO配置数据。Shift+右键单击机器以复制数据。
hint.ltxi.io_card.encoded: Shift+右键单击兼容的机器以粘贴配置，单击空气清除。
hint.ltxi.shift_hover: 按 SHIFT 查看更多信息
item.ltxi.empty_fabrication_blueprint.hi: 在组装器中编码组装配方
item.ltxi.explosives_weapon_energy.hint: 可为爆破型武器充能的一次性能量电池。
item.ltxi.heavy_weapon_energy.hint: 可为重型武器充能的一次性能量电池。
item.ltxi.impulse_tech_part.hint: Hydrogen-fueled device that generates powerful yet precise shock waves. Optimal for propulsion and explosive systems.
item.ltxi.lightweight_weapon_energy.hint: 可为轻型武器充能的一次性能量电池。
item.ltxi.netherite_ore_pebbles: 粉碎下界合金碎片矿石
item.ltxi.optical_tech_part.hint: 带有板载数据处理器的多功能透镜，可用于目标处理和视觉辅助。
item.ltxi.specialist_weapon_energy.hint: 可为专业型武器充能的一次性能量电池。
item.ltxi.t1_circuit.hint: 一级电路。其能量和数据处理能力对大部分入门级应用已经足够。
item.ltxi.t2_circuit.hint: 二级电路。使用了更高质量的导体，提升了能量和数据处理效率。
item.ltxi.t3_circuit.hint: 三级电路。在使用通常材料的电路中性能最强，能够运行所有标准的工业和工程应用。
item.ltxi.t4_circuit.hint: 四级电路。将奇特的晶体-金属纳米结构封装于小型的电路中，达到了无与伦比的能量和数据处理效率。
item.ltxi.t5_circuit.hint: 五级电路，也是最高级的电路。能够在不违反物理定律的前提下创造微型的数字宇宙进行计算。别问怎么实现的。
msg.ltxi.io_card.invalid_setup: Machine does not support this IO config.
msg.ltxi.no_guideme: GuideME is not installed. It is required for the Guide Tablet to work.
tooltip.ltxi.energy_overcharge: Energy Overcharged! Your energy stored is more than your current capacity.
tooltip.ltxi.fabricator_selected: Left click to craft. Right click to encode blueprint (must have blank blueprint in slot).
tooltip.ltxi.output.not_required: Optional Output. Will be discarded without halting crafting if space is limited.
tooltip.ltxi.upgrade_remove_hint: Shift + left click to remove upgrade. Must have space in your inventory.
upgrade.ltxi.acid_grenade_core.desc: Grenades contain a highly corrosive acid that reduces target armor strength.
upgrade.ltxi.armor_defense.desc: Upgrades AL/1C's shell with an energy-powered impact and trauma attenuation system.
upgrade.ltxi.armor_passive_shield.desc: Upgrades AL/1C with auto-recharging Bubble Shield engines. Can be installed on all pieces.
upgrade.ltxi.breathing_unit.desc: Allows indefinite operation underwater for the user.
upgrade.ltxi.creative_flight.desc: One of the §oWonderland§r project's most successful experiments. Allows the user to exist outside the laws of gravity.
upgrade.ltxi.cryo_grenade_core.desc: Grenades contain a cryogenic compound that freezes a large area.
upgrade.ltxi.default.aurora.desc: Aurora's combat precepts, specialized in fast assault and scout operations.
upgrade.ltxi.default.epsilon_melee.desc: Standard issue operating system. Tool energy blade is optimized for efficient severing and disintegration of organic matter.
upgrade.ltxi.default.epsilon_shovel.desc: Standard issue operating system. Tool energy cutter preserves topographical integrity.
upgrade.ltxi.default.epsilon_wrench.desc: Standard issue operating system. Enables lossless dismantling and retrieval of machines.
upgrade.ltxi.default.mirage.desc: Mirage's lightfrags pierce without physical impulse for efficient damage output levels.
upgrade.ltxi.default.nova.desc: Nova's lightfrags can knock away even the heaviest targets.
upgrade.ltxi.default.serenity.desc: Serenity's small lightfrags zip right through targets without a trace.
upgrade.ltxi.default.serenity.tooltip0: No anger and knockback on damage
upgrade.ltxi.default.stargazer.desc: Stargazer's systems are calibrated for precise long-range engagements.
upgrade.ltxi.default.stargazer.tooltip0: %s bonus damage per meter after %sm (%s max bonus)
upgrade.ltxi.default.stargazer.tooltip1: %s bonus damage when standing still and sneaking
upgrade.ltxi.default.wayfinder.desc: Wayfinder's energy feed system ships pre-configured to use Common Energy.
upgrade.ltxi.default.wonderland_body.des: Vital function management system of the AL/1C bodysuit.
upgrade.ltxi.default.wonderland_feet.des: Bipedal stabilization systems of the AL/1C bodysuit.
upgrade.ltxi.default.wonderland_head.des: Neural processor core of the AL/1C bodysuit.
upgrade.ltxi.default.wonderland_legs.des: Primary locomotion systems of the AL/1C bodysuit.
upgrade.ltxi.eca_capacity.desc: Increases the energy capacity and transfer rate of the Energy Cell Array.
upgrade.ltxi.electric_grenade_core.desc: Grenades create a burst of electrical energy. Recommended for use in humid/aquatic environments.
Improves detection of high-grade LTX ammunition in the field.
upgrade.ltxi.enchantment.efficiency.desc: Enhances the power feed to the tool's energy cutter.
upgrade.ltxi.enchantment.fortune.desc: Calibrated to extract superior quantities of valuable resources.
upgrade.ltxi.enchantment.looting.desc: Calibrated to maximize structural integrity of salvageable biomaterials.
upgrade.ltxi.enchantment.razor.desc: Weapon calibration enables the retrieval of anatomical curiosities.
upgrade.ltxi.enchantment.silk_touch.desc: Calibrated to extract intact samples from the terrain.
upgrade.ltxi.epsilon_fishing_lure.desc: Upgraded lure for the ε-Series fishing rod. Attracts more valuable aquatic specimens faster than regular bait.
upgrade.ltxi.epsilon_omni_drill.desc: Restored prototype ε mining tech with bypassed safeties. Makes modular mining tools effective against all material types.
upgrade.ltxi.equipment_block_drops_captu: Establishes a matter warp link capable of intercepting material harvesting products.
upgrade.ltxi.equipment_energy_upgrade.de: Maximize your equipment's field uptime with this upgraded battery.
upgrade.ltxi.explosives_energy_adapter.d: Reroutes the energy feed system of Explosives weaponry to use Common Energy.
upgrade.ltxi.fabricator_upgrade.desc: Elevate your Fabricator's manufacturing capabilities with superior internal components.
upgrade.ltxi.flame_grenade_core.desc: Grenades are loaded with a concentrated fuel that creates powerful flames.
upgrade.ltxi.geo_synthesizer_parallel.de: A specialized parallel processor for producing geological material.
upgrade.ltxi.gloom_gas_grenade_core.desc: Shells unleash a debilitating cloud of Gloom Shroom spores on impact.
upgrade.ltxi.gpm_parallel.desc: Parallelized task framework that completes multiple operations per cycle, as input and output constraints permit.
upgrade.ltxi.hanabi_speed_boost.desc: Increases the velocity of the Hanabi grenades.
upgrade.ltxi.head_experience_capture.des: AL/1C's neural processor can parse combat experience in real-time without user input.
upgrade.ltxi.heavy_energy_adapter.desc: Reroutes the energy feed system of Heavy weaponry to use Common Energy.
upgrade.ltxi.infinite_ammo.desc: Ignore the laws of physics with this never-ending ammo source. Try not to cause a mass extinction event.
Reroutes the energy feed system of Lightweight weaponry to use Common Energy.
upgrade.ltxi.mob_drops_capture.desc: Establishes a matter warp link capable of intercepting loot from defeated targets. Regrettably, cannot collect experience.
upgrade.ltxi.night_vision.desc: AL/1C optics modified to work in low light environments.
upgrade.ltxi.no_anger_attacks.desc: Traceable identity masking tech derived from ephemeral materials. May not confuse a more discerning target.
upgrade.ltxi.nova_god_rounds.desc: Rip through reality itself with this Nova upgrade. Ensures swift defeat of even the strongest enemies.
upgrade.ltxi.omni_grenade_core.desc: Full spectrum adaptable core for the Hanabi. Allows the use of any of grenade shells.
upgrade.ltxi.saturation.desc: Injects a stable mix of nutrients required for healthy function.
upgrade.ltxi.specialist_energy_adapter.d: Reroutes the energy feed system of Specialist weaponry to use Common Energy.
upgrade.ltxi.standard_machine_systems.de: Core modular systems designed for balanced efficiency.
upgrade.ltxi.targeting.all.desc: Permits engagement of any living target. Not necessary on weaponry.
upgrade.ltxi.targeting.hostile_only.desc: Restricts engagement to actively hostile targets.
upgrade.ltxi.targeting.neutral_enemy.des: Restricts engagement to neutral enemies and hostile targets.
upgrade.ltxi.tool_netherite_level.desc: Upgraded tool cutters can harvest Netherite-level materials.
upgrade.ltxi.tool_vibration_cancel.desc: Special lining on this tool's servos dampen vibrations from standard use.
upgrade.ltxi.tree_vein_mine.desc: Automatic harvesting algorithm for the ε-Series Axe's energy cutter. May cause localized deforestation.
Smarter turret targeting systems allow for increased loot drops from eliminated targets.
upgrade.ltxi.turret_enchantment.razor.de: Precise turret calibration enables the collection of anatomical curiosities.
upgrade.ltxi.ultimate_machine_systems.de: The pinnacle of engineering precision! Achieves near-instantaneous crafting at the cost of immense energy consumption.
upgrade.ltxi.weapon_vibration_cancel.des: Augments weapons and projectiles with an anti-resonance field, erasing vibration signatures
upgrade_effect.ltxi.capture_block_drops: Captures %s block drops to your inventory
upgrade_effect.ltxi.capture_mob_drops: Captures mob drops to your inventory
upgrade_effect.ltxi.capture_mob_experien: Captures mob experience from both your and your turrets' mob kills
upgrade_effect.ltxi.reload_source.energy: Weapon reloads from an internal CE battery
upgrade_effect.ltxi.reload_source.infini: Grants weapon an infinite, never-draining magazine
